steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: Left of the blank is the noun “chemistry”; right of it is the conjunction “and” with the noun phrase “his colleagues” and the verb phrase. This creates a compound subject structure.

steps.title: Apply the title-name rule
steps.content: A title and proper name form a single unit with no commas between them—”professor Yugang Sun” is the correct form without internal punctuation. Options B, C, and D all insert commas that interrupt this unit. That matches choice A — A is correct.
